cmds: cd frontend && npm ci && npm run build && cd .. && pip install -r backend/requirements.txt

start.cmd: cd backend && python -m app.utils.seed_demo && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}

deploy.startCommand: cd backend && python -m app.utils.seed_demo && uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port ${PORT:-8000}
